document.docAuthor: Liao, Xiang-Ping, Chen, Bin & Li, Ting-Jing
document.masterDocTitle: A taxonomic revision of the subfamily Myzininae from China, with a key to the Chinese species (Hymenoptera: Tiphiidae)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A taxonomic revision of the subfamily Myzininae from China, with a key to the Chinese species (Hymenoptera: Tiphiidae)

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Chongqing Key Laboratory of Vector Insects; Institute of Entomology and Molecular Biology, Chongqing Normal University, Chongqing 401331, China; & xiangping _ liao @ 163. com
Chongqing Key Laboratory of Vector Insects; Institute of Entomology and Molecular Biology, Chongqing Normal University, Chongqing 401331, China; & c _ bin @ hotmail. com
Chongqing Key Laboratory of Vector Insects; Institute of Entomology and Molecular Biology, Chongqing Normal University, Chongqing 401331, China;

subSubSection.paragraph:
Meria discussa Guiglia, 1973
, Annali Mus . Civ . St. Nat. Genov. 79: 272–273; Gorbatovsky, 1980 , Nase. Mong. 7: 317–320; Nonnaizab, 1999: 370 ; Boni Bartalucci, 2004a , Linzer boil. Beitr. 36(2): 397–399; Boni Bartalucci, 2016 , Onyc. 12: 59.

Meria investiganda Guiglia, 1973
, Annali Mus . Civ . St. Nat. Genov. 79: 273–274. Synonym of
Meria discussa
by Gorbatovsky, 1980 , Nase. Mong. 7: 317.

Meria perfecta Guiglia, 1975
, Boll. Mus . Civ . Stor. Nat. Venezia, 27: 105. Synonym of
Meria discussa
by Gorbatovsky, 1980 , Nase. Mong. 7: 317.

Meria similis Guiglia, 1975
, Boll. Mus . Civ . Stor. Nat. Venezia, 27: 106. Synonym of
Meria discussa
by Gorbatovsky, 1980 , Nase. Mong. 7: 317.

Material examined.
